title: Preorders Are Live for Brand New Pokémon LEGO Sets, Launching in August and October
description: LEGO has revealed a new selection of Pokémon LEGO sets: Arcanine, Munchlax, Rayquaza, the Iconic Trainer Moments Poké Ball, and an Up-Scaled Red Minifigure. These are all available to preorder right now and set to release in both August and October.

title: LEGO Set Leaks Reveal First Pokémon Minifigures, Including Professor Oak and Red, Plus Pikachu and Eevee
